app_settings.description: Key-value pairs of settings for the web app.

client_affinity_enabled.description: Indicates if client affinity (ARR affinity) is enabled for the web app.

client_certificate_enabled.description: Specifies if client certificates are required for the web app.

client_certificate_exclusion_paths.description: Paths that are excluded from requiring a client certificate.

client_certificate_mode.description: The mode of client certificate requirement (e.g., Required, Optional, etc.).

enabled.description: Determines if the web app is enabled or not.

ftp_publish_basic_authentication_enabled.description: Specifies if basic authentication is enabled for FTP publishing.

https_only.description: Indicates if only HTTPS traffic is allowed for the web app.

name.description: The name of the web app.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Specifies if public network access is enabled for the web app.

service_plan_id.description: The ID of the service plan associated with the web app.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the web app for categorization.

virtual_network_subnet_id.description: The ID of the virtual network subnet used by the web app.

webdeploy_publish_basic_authentication_e.description: Indicates if basic authentication is enabled for WebDeploy publishing.

connection_string.description: Connection string for the web app.
connection_string.type: list(object({name: string, type: string, value: string}))

site_config.description: Configuration settings for the web app.
site_config.type: list(object({always_on: bool, application_stack: list(object({current_stack: string, docker_image_name: string, docker_registry_url: string, docker_registry_username: string, docker_registry_password: string, dotnet_version: string, dotnet_core_version: string, tomcat_version: string, java_embedded_server_enabled: bool, java_version: string, node_version: string, php_version: string, python: bool })), default_documents: list(string), ftps_state: string, health_check_path: string, health_check_eviction_time_in_min: number, http2_enabled: bool, ip_restriction: list(object({action: string, ip_address: string, name: string, priority: number, service_tag: string, virtual_network_subnet_id: string})), ip_restriction_default_action: string, load_balancing_mode: string, local_mysql_enabled: bool, managed_pipeline_mode: string, minimum_tls_version: string, remote_debugging_enabled: bool, remote_debugging_version: string, use_32_bit_worker: bool, vnet_route_all_enabled: bool, websockets_enabled: bool, worker_count: number }))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
